occupation_definition: Administer oral hygiene care to patients. Assess patient oral hygiene problems or needs and maintain health records. Advise patients on oral health maintenance and disease prevention. May provide advanced care such as providing fluoride treatment or administering topical anesthesia.

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Miscellaneous Healthcare Diagnosing or Treating Practitioners
